text_excerpt: Contact | Lincoln Jopp MC MP Skip to main content Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Main navigation About Lincoln News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Articles & Media Lincoln Jopp MC MP for Spelthorne Contact Leave this field blank Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 7619 / 020 721 977 48 [email protected] On Facebook On X (Twitter) We do not respond to autogenerated mass campaign emails or copy and paste e-mails. Your correspondence will not be filed; however, you are welcome to write a personal letter or email to me outlining your concerns. If you have cc'd me into correspondence with a 3rd party but have not asked me to take any action on your behalf a response will not be sent but your correspondence will be filed. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
